items.extraction_note: Communication chain breaks at the shore, leaving local commanders blind beyond immediate sight.
Enemy HQ picture lags behind the battlefield reality.

source: The Battle of Carentan (8-15 June): Utah Beach to Cherbourg
items.extraction_note: Artillery support cannot be synchronized without a functional report channel.

source: FM 24-5 Basic Field Manual, Signal Communication
items.extraction_note: Formal message layout reduces ambiguity but adds time and procedural load.

source: HQ 8 Cdn Inf Bde, Operation Windsor
items.extraction_note: Staff reports turn action into memory and lessons.
